description_long: This is a single-story modern house with a flat roof and a compact, rectangular layout. The exterior walls are finished in a light beige or grayish brick, complemented by large white-framed windows on the front and side. The property is enclosed by a dark and light fence, with a driveway leading to a carport on the right side, where a white car is parked. A small landscaped garden with a tree and flower bed is situated at the front, adding greenery to the urban setting. The house features a simple, functional entryway with a single door and no porch or overhang. The interior layout is visible from above, showing multiple rooms and a clear division between living and utility spaces.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, light brick exterior, large windows, a carport, and a small landscaped front yard enclosed by a fence.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry door, large windows, carport with a white car, and landscaped garden with a tree.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the fenced yard, grassy area, and the car partially visible in the driveway.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain brick wall with windows and the back of the fenced property.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the carport, garden, and the side of the house with minimal windows.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large front and side windows
attribute_entryway_design: Simple single-door entry with no porch or overhang, directly accessible from the driveway
